## Description
<!-- Describe your changes in detail -->

## Type of Change
<!-- Mark the relevant option with an 'x' -->

- [ ] 🚀 Feature (`type: feature`) - New functionality
- [ ] 🐛 Bug Fix (`type: bug`) - Fixes an issue
- [ ] 📚 Documentation (`type: docs`) - Documentation changes
- [ ] 🔧 Refactor (`type: refactor`) - Code improvements without changing functionality
- [ ] ⚡ Performance (`type: perf`) - Performance improvements
- [ ] 🧪 Test (`type: test`) - Adding or updating tests
- [ ] 🏗️ Build/CI (`type: build` or `type: ci`) - Build system or CI changes
- [ ] 🔨 Chore (`type: chore`) - Maintenance tasks
- [ ] 💥 Breaking Change - Requires major version bump
- [ ] 🔒 Security - Security-related changes

## Related Issue
<!-- Link to the issue this PR addresses -->

Closes #

## Checklist
<!-- Mark completed items with an 'x' -->

- [ ] My code follows the project's style guidelines
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my code
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] I have made corresponding changes to the documentation
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works
- [ ] New and existing unit tests pass locally with my changes
- [ ] I have signed my commits with GPG/SSH
- [ ] My commit messages follow the [conventional commits](../.github/COMMIT_CONVENTIONS.md) format
- [ ] I have added appropriate labels to this PR
